title: C#/.NET Developers
raw_text:
C#/.NET Developers

Deadline: April 30

Developers that are strong in C#/.NET, especially if you’ve worked on fintech or payment systems, ITEX is urgently looking to fill in this role.

Apply here: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfGf44RpXukeK2Ux9pVITe0CzE0cr67Yh1iKF6rzm_Z6-pzTA/viewform
